summary: All three requirements (REQ-74, REQ-75, REQ-76) appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-74 is fully addressed in apiConfig.ts with the hardcoded endpoint, buildGeminiUrl helper, inline comments, and no dynamic construction. REQ-75 is addressed in analysisApi.ts with JSON body format, base64 encoding, and no FormData. REQ-76 is addressed in ProcessingScreen.tsx with 404 detection, Portuguese error message, and 'Ir para Configurações' button. The diff is truncated for some files, so some details cannot be fully verified, but evidence is strong across all requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: A getGeminiConfig function was added to apiConfig.ts in addition to buildGeminiUrl, returning both the URL and headers object.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only required a buildGeminiUrl(apiKey) helper that appends the API key as a query parameter. The additional getGeminiConfig function was not requested.
